label: Ritual outcome comp (destroy consumable building)
description: Applies when the ritual target building is destroyed as part of the ritual. Extends RitualOutcomeComp directly; does not use a quality curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when the ritual target building is present and destroyed.
